return(function(...)local end local function M(M)return x[M-(-590581-(-615930))]end do local M=string.len local O={z=-302540+302592,s=821774+-821742,["\049"]=-824086-(-824101);["\048"]=323814-323805;b=-198687+198692,a=222876+-222836;["\055"]=-282511-(-282566),t=-780925+780984;P=107752-107719;O=842738+-842695;D=-799889+799937,["\051"]=-406775-(-406821);["\043"]=161002-160982,H=-472661-(-472674),Y=-241408+241457;X=-825176-(-825239),M=211054+-211038,y=649918-649858;Q=20377+-20366;e=574514+-574475,["\056"]=-184513+184548;N=594607-594569,["\052"]=-800783-(-800808);["\053"]=-341286-(-341313);k=979971+-979927;r=-87203+87259;q=426481-426463;E=-821028-(-821090),U=-201144+201148;["\050"]=-673965+673984,h=954009-953959,V=1037367+-1037344,F=580218-580201;j=-180112-(-180146),J=-873706+873742;A=-387912-(-387943);Z=476184-476176;S=-674775-(-674820),G=19180+-19143;x=563029-563007;R=12098-12047;K=458587-458573,I=-242135+242192,o=-142620+142630,d=213579+-213518;p=91938+-91897;C=-724088-(-724109),W=-80284+80312;v=-89093-(-89105),u=824283+-824236;["\054"]=-944813+944816,n=157760-157760,w=58931-58902,B=-177121+177123;l=-462658+462684;i=475410-475356;T=-374376+374382;["\047"]=-89709-(-89767);f=632771-632770;["\057"]=-261513-(-261537),m=177945-177938,g=-792929-(-792982),c=-561777+561807;L=-540528-(-540570)}local return(function(x,S,Z,V,E,U,Y,b,O,N,B,c,W,F,o,X,j,e,Q,r,D,m,g)W,X,j,Q,m,O,g,B,b,e,o,r,F,c,N,D=function(x,M)local S=c(M)local Z=function(Z,V,E,U,Y,X)return O(x,{Z,V,E;U,Y,X},M,S)end return Z end,{},function(x,M)local S=c(M)local Z=function(...)return O(x,{...},M,S)end return Z end,function(x,M)local S=c(M)local Z=function(Z,V,E,U,Y)return O(x,{Z,V;E;U,Y},M,S)end return Z end,function(x)local M,O=482033+-482032,x[-960569+960570]while O do o[O],M=o[O]-(-56966-(-56967)),(304062-304061)+M if o[O]==-609014-(-609014)then o[O],X[O]=nil,nil end O=x[M]end end,function(O,Z,V,E)local j,CF,eF,KF,bF,YF,J,K,h,SF,f,UF,MF,jF,EF,P,i,l,c,s,WF,d,T,BF,DF,oF,G,v,w,ZF,gF,zF,y,t,rF,Y,H,p,OF,cF,u,NF,o,xF,L,k,g,I,R,QF,XF,mF,z,m,q,a,FF,C,A,n,VF while O do if
